subtasks.description: Engineer 'u_7732' attempts to deploy a hotfix to production environment 'prod-us-east-1' outside of the approved maintenance window (current time: 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday).

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Deployment denied. User has engineer role meeting POL-401 requirements. However, current time (Tuesday 02:15 UTC) falls outside approved maintenance window (Saturday 10 PM – Sunday 6 AM UTC per POL-403). POL-402 requires CAB approval for production deployments outside maintenance windows, which has not been obtained.
applied_constraints: Deployment blocked until Change Advisory Board (CAB) approval obtained
Engineer must submit CAB request with business justification for out-of-window hotfix deployment
